' i , Ef-llOll/l/90-qTTM-S'.] MINISTRY OF COMMERCE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th May, 1991 S.O. 382(E).—Whereas a draft of certain rules further to amend the Tea Rules, 1954, was published as required by sub-section (1) of section '19 of. tire Tea Act, 1953 (29 of 1953), at page 3 of the Gazette of India, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) dated the 31st October, 1990 with the notification oJ the Government of India in the Ministry of Com- merce, G.S.R. 831(E), dated the 31st October, 1990, inviting objections or suggestions from all persons likely to be affected thereby within a period ot forty- five days from the date of publication of the said notification in the Official Gazette ; And whereas tire said Gazette was made available to the public on the 22nd November, 1990 ; And whereas no objections or suggestions were received from the public on the said draft; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 49, read with clause (h) or sub-section (2) of section 49 of the said Art, the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Tea Rules, 1954, namely :— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Tea (Amendment) Rules, 1991. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Tea Rules, 1951, for rules 13 and ISA, the following rules shall Vie substituted namely :— "13. Function of Committees.—The Executive Committee, the Licensing Committee, the l a b o u r Welfare Committee and the Deve- lopment Committee shall discharge such functions and exercise such powers, not being those mentioned in Rule 18, as may be delegated to them by the Board : Provided that all decisions taken by the aforesaid committees in the exercise of the delegated powers shall he placed before the Board for information within a period oE fifteen days from the dale on which the decision was taken." ; "13A. Powers of the Export Promotion Com- mittee.—The Export Promotion Committee shall exercise all the executive and finan- cial powers of the Board in rwpert of matters relating to Tea promotion subject to the overall control of the Board : Provided that all decisions, taken by the aforesaid committee in the exercise of tho delegated powers shall be placed before the Board f'»r information within a period of fifteen days from the d;tte on which the decision was taken-" [F. No. T-11011|l|90-Plant. A ] G. SUNDARAM, Addl. Secy.
